steps.title: Expand the left side using the distributive property
steps.content:
Apply distribution: $2(p + 1) = 2p + 2$ and $8(p - 1) = 8p - 8$. The equation becomes:
$$2p + 2 + 8p - 8 = 5p$$

steps.title: Combine like terms and solve for p
steps.content:
On the left, combine $p$ terms and constants: $2p + 8p = 10p$ and $2 - 8 = -6$, giving:
$$10p - 6 = 5p$$
Subtract $5p$ from both sides:
$$5p - 6 = 0$$
Add 6 to both sides:
$$5p = 6$$
Divide by 5:
$$p = \frac{6}{5}$$
